objective: Complete the overnight high-priority roadmap for Notebook Atelier with minimal founder intervention.

tasks.title: Stabilize the Ready To Buy product block
done_when: Live recommendation results show one or more matched products
Product links open correctly from the public site
Empty product states are handled visibly and safely

tasks.title: Instrument recommendation and product click tracking
done_when: Recommendation and outbound click events are stored with profile context
The implementation is safe for production use

tasks.title: Tighten the mobile-first buyer funnel
done_when: Homepage and result flow read clearly on mobile
No operator-facing copy remains in the main buyer flow

tasks.title: Create the first buying-intent article system
done_when: There is a reusable article template structure
The first 5 high-intent article targets are defined in code or content files

tasks.title: Define the first Instagram content automation pipeline
done_when: Caption and CTA templates are documented

tasks.title: Prepare the first weekly KPI reporting structure
done_when: Key inputs and sources are documented
